name: bandit.camp_map_vanished_signal_redispatch
description: Fixture-backed camp-map product proof: a current-build McWilliams bandit live-world camp starts outside direct-player range with no live smoke/fire signal, but has a persisted scout-confirmed remembered lead. The scenario waits through the real 30-minute overmap dispatch cadence, then requires same-run logs and saved state proving the camp re-dispatched from remembered camp-map knowledge and sized a larger-than-scout stalk/pressure group.

steps.label: post_load_remembered_lead_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the remembered camp-map lead fixture; this proves only startup/load and fixture footing before the cadence wait
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later dispatch-cadence evidence cannot be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_vanished_signal_camp_map_lead
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the persisted vanished-signal remembered camp-map lead contract
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains an inactive camp with a scout-confirmed remembered lead carrying target id, OMT, bounty, threat, confidence, source/outcome, last-seen/check/scout clocks, target-alert/scout-seen, and prior-loss fields before live cadence proof starts
steps.failure_rule: If the remembered lead is missing or malformed, a later dispatch log cannot be credited as camp-map redispatch proof.

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_remembered_lead_dispatch_cadence
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through the real 30-minute overmap NPC cadence window; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact lines, not on the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks remembered-camp-map dispatch planning, this scenario is inconclusive/red.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_remembered_lead_dispatch
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the remembered-lead dispatch probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean saved-state proof.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_remembered_lead_dispatch
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the remembered-lead dispatch probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_stalk_dispatch_from_remembered_lead
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not persist an active stalk/pressure dispatch from remembered camp-map knowledge
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, saved bandit_live_world contains an active stalk dispatch targeted at the remembered player lead, with at least a stalk pair of concrete active members and the original camp-map lead still present
steps.failure_rule: If active stalk dispatch state or concrete active-member lookup is missing, the same-run log cannot close product proof by itself.

steps.label: audit_remembered_lead_dispatch_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show remembered lead source, reward/risk inputs, selected stalk job/member count, reserve/dispatchable numbers, no live signal, and live local-gate dispatch
steps.failure_rule: No camp-map redispatch credit if the artifact lacks the remembered-lead source/reward/risk/sizing line and the live local-gate line from the same run.

evidence_contract.claim: a vanished/absent live signal does not erase scout-confirmed camp-map knowledge; the real 30-minute live dispatch cadence can consume the persisted lead and size a larger-than-scout stalk/pressure group from current roster/risk/reward
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for remembered-lead dispatch behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, saved preflight camp-map lead, real wait/cadence action, same-run dispatch-plan artifact, no live signal, remembered-lead source/risk/reward/member/reserve fields, local-gate dispatch line, save/writeback, and saved active stalk state are not all green/matched.
